name: Milestone Credit Solutions, LLC.
description_short: MSI Credit Solutions is a credit repair company offering dispute services and credit counseling to help consumers improve their credit profiles.
description_long:
Milestone Credit Solutions, LLC (doing business as MSI Credit Solutions) operates as a credit repair firm based in Dallas, Texas. The company maintains a physical office at 12750 Merit Drive, Suite 400, and provides remote customer service through phone, email, and web-based contact channels. According to their website, they position themselves as a credit improvement partner offering guidance on disputing errors and negative items on credit reports.

MSI Credit Solutions offers free credit consultations with their team of credit specialists. Their service model appears centered on credit dispute assistance and credit counseling, though their website contact form does not detail specific service packages, pricing, or the range of disputes they handle. The company maintains business hours Monday through Thursday from 9 AM to 6 PM CST, Friday 9 AM to 5 PM CST, and is closed weekends.

The company distinguishes itself through accessibility features on their website, including dyslexia-friendly fonts, adjustable text sizing, high-contrast display options, and reading guides. They emphasize immediate availability through free consultations and provide multiple contact methods (phone, email, fax, contact form). Their website includes Spanish language options, suggesting multilingual customer support.

Significant limitations exist in evaluating this company. Their website provides no information about specific dispute processes, success rates, customer testimonials, BBB ratings, FTC compliance history, or pricing structures. No details are available regarding licensing, certifications, years in operation, or number of clients served. The lack of transparent service descriptions and performance metrics makes it difficult for consumers to assess their actual capabilities or legitimacy before engaging services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free credit consultations with credit specialists before committing to paid services
Multiple contact methods available: phone, email, fax, and online contact form
Extended business hours (9 AM-6 PM CST most weekdays) for working consumers
Website includes Spanish language option for non-English speakers
Comprehensive accessibility features including dyslexia-friendly fonts and high-contrast display options
Dallas-based with physical office address provided for verification and in-person contact
cons: Website lacks specific information about service offerings, pricing, or dispute success rates
No customer testimonials, case studies, or performance metrics available on website
No BBB rating, FTC complaint history, or regulatory compliance information disclosed
Business hours limited to weekdays; no weekend or evening support beyond Friday 5 PM
Unclear licensing, certifications, or years in business on provided website content
best_for: Consumers with credit report errors who want a free initial consultation before deciding
Spanish-speaking consumers seeking credit repair assistance with language support
Individuals requiring accessibility features or assistance with visual/cognitive processing
diagnosis: MSI Credit Solutions is best for consumers seeking a free initial credit consultation to determine if professional dispute assistance is needed. However, the complete lack of transparent pricing, service details, success metrics, and regulatory compliance information on their website prevents thorough due diligence; consumers should request detailed service agreements and verify licensing before purchasing any services.
services: Free credit consultations with credit specialists
Credit dispute assistance for negative items on credit reports
Credit report error identification and dispute support
Online contact and inquiry management through web form
Accessibility-enhanced web platform for service access
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
